creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: zi
Date: Tue Feb 19 03:25:46 2013
New Revision: 312540
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312540

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.0 [1]
  - Fix build when using alternate PREFIX/LOCALBASE
  - Fix plist by adding MANCOMPRESSED=no
  
  PR:		ports/176254
  Submitted by:	Eric F Crist <ecrist@secure-computing.net> (maintainer) [1]

Modified:
  head/security/ssl-admin/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/security/ssl-admin/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/security/ssl-admin/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/ssl-admin/Makefile	Tue Feb 19 03:02:39 2013	(r312539)
+++ head/security/ssl-admin/Makefile	Tue Feb 19 03:25:46 2013	(r312540)
@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ssl-admin
-DISTVERSION=	1.0.5
+DISTVERSION=	1.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.secure-computing.net/pub/FreeBSD/ports/ssl-admin/ \
-				ftp://ftp2.secure-computing.net/pub/FreeBSD/ports/ssl-admin/
+		ftp://ftp2.secure-computing.net/pub/FreeBSD/ports/ssl-admin/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ecrist@secure-computing.net
 COMMENT=	OpenSSL certificate manager with OpenVPN support
@@ -18,6 +18,9 @@ USE_PERL5_RUN=	YES
 MAN1=		ssl-admin.1
 MAN5=		ssl-admin.conf.5
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
+MANCOMPRESSED=	no
+MAKE_ENV=	ETCDIR=${PREFIX}/etc BINDIR=${PREFIX}/bin \
+		MANDIR=${MANPREFIX}/man
 
 post-install:
 	${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}

Modified: head/security/ssl-admin/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/security/ssl-admin/distinfo	Tue Feb 19 03:02:39 2013	(r312539)
+++ head/security/ssl-admin/distinfo	Tue Feb 19 03:25:46 2013	(r312540)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ssl-admin-1.0.5.tar.gz) = f5b6805dc1ea618d582174e48524bbf53ab196c0e249167248765475544e6047
-SIZE (ssl-admin-1.0.5.tar.gz) = 8972
+SHA256 (ssl-admin-1.1.0.tar.gz) = fce10084dc50b7b3f9c33a068ff4cc355d07f2d51ad822006ca12ccb305f28dd
+SIZE (ssl-admin-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 9513
